query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_knowledge, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN sourceType = 'learning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as from_learning,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sourceType = 'user' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as from_user,
  MAX(createdAt) as last_created
FROM knowledge;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3QQhaXF1ucYHpuK.e4b7c6254861 --database 25NeaJLRyMKQFYzeZChVTB --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_knowledge, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN sourceType = 'learning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as from_learning,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sourceType = 'user' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as from_user,
  MAX(createdAt) as last_created
FROM knowledge;
